audit_items.proof_trace: All critical pointer dereferences are protected by lifecycle ordering guarantees. `_flow_controller` (dereferenced at L462, L513) is always set in `OnCreated()` before `set_socket_connected()` is called in the same I/O thread, and both `try_start_receive()` and `try_start_send()` additionally gate on `is_connected()` before reaching the dereference. `_current_rpc_request_parser` (L582) is only reachable after `choose_rpc_request_parser()` sets it (or returns false, aborting before L582). All parser objects in `_rpc_request_parsers` are non-null (registered with `new` in `RegisteredParsers()`), `_receiving_data` is always set by `reset_tran_buf()` in `on_connected()`, and `_sending_message` is only accessed in `on_write_some()` which executes only after `async_write_some()` is dispatched with a valid sending message.
